news.headline: Home Trends & Design appoints Frank Richardson as Director of Business Development in Austin, TX.
news.summary: A leader in sustainable and artisanal furniture, Home Trends & Design (HTD) has appointed Frank Richardson as the Director of Business Development in Austin, Texas as of October 22, 2024. In this role, Richardson will be responsible for driving the company's business growth and development strategies.

news.headline: Bitcoin, Ethereum, Dogecoin trade sideways: Bitcoin at $67,436.75 (-0.03%), Ethereum at $2,626.50 (-1.7%), Dogecoin at $0.1395 (-2.3%). Transactions above $100,000 increased from 5,769 to 8,957 in a day, while 57,215 traders were liquidated in the past 24 hours for $165.97 million.
news.summary: Cryptocurrency markets are currently experiencing a period of relative stability, with prices remaining largely unchanged. Bitcoin (BTC) is trading at $67,436.75 with a decrease of 0.03%, Ethereum (ETH) at $2,626.50 down by 1.7%, Solana (SOL) at $168.23 showing a 1.3% increase, Dogecoin (DOGE) at $0.1395 down by 2.3%, and Shiba Inu (SHIB) at $0.00001823 with a 1.3% decline.Key data indicates a notable increase in large transaction volumes by 78.9%, while daily active addresses have decreased by 4.6%. Transactions exceeding $100,000 surged from 5,769 to 8,957 in a single day. However, exchanges netflows have seen a decline of 151%. The market also saw 57,215 traders liquidated in the past 24 hours, totaling $165.97 million in losses according to Coinglass data.In recent developments, Brad Garlinghouse has defended Ripple Co-Founder’s donation to Kamala Harris amidst discussions on XRP's classification. V3V Ventures made a $5 million investment in premium Telegram usernames to enhance crypto channel growth. Meanwhile, Donald Trump’s election odds have risen to 64% on Polymarket and 60% on Kalshi, making him the favorite in swing states, signaling potential market impact.For the full news story, visit Benzinga.com.

Luxury home builder Toll Brothers to launch Foxtail Crossing community in Colorado Springs at Tutt Blvd/Dublin Blvd intersection. Sales start spring 2025.
news.summary: In Colorado Springs, on Oct. 22, 2024, Toll Brothers, Inc. (NYSE:TOL), renowned for luxury home construction, unveiled its upcoming community, Foxtail Crossing, located near Tutt Boulevard and Dublin Boulevard. The Sales Center and Toll Brothers model homes will be built starting November, with sales commencing in spring 2025.

news.headline: AtlantiCare appoints Joseph V. Lombardi as Chief Physician Executive to enhance patient care with 30 years of experience.
news.summary: A highly respected cardiovascular surgeon with over 30 years of experience will be enhancing the standard of care in the region. AtlantiCare, a top healthcare organization in southeastern New Jersey and the largest in the area, revealed this development on October 22, 2024.

ERI and Sony Electronics team up for a free e-waste recycling event in Madison, Wisconsin at Alliant Energy Center.
news.summary: In Madison, Wisconsin, ERI, a prominent electronics recycler and cybersecurity hardware destruction company, has partnered with Sony Electronics Inc. to offer Dane County and neighboring residents a convenient opportunity to recycle unwanted consumer electronics. This initiative will take place at a no-cost e-waste collection event at Alliant Energy Center this coming Sunday. ERI will be collecting all unwanted electronics for responsible recycling or refurbishment during the event.

news.headline: $20 eco-friendly hearing aid by Quantum Senses competes with expensive options, made from fully recycled materials.
news.summary: Quantum Senses is striving to provide a cost-effective and long-lasting option to the pricey hearing aids available in the market. This innovative product is crafted entirely from recycled materials, making it an eco-friendly choice.

news.headline: Market uncertainty on real estate due to recent rate cuts - Cohen & Steers VP - sources report.

Welltower to report Q3 earnings on Oct. 28, with expected revenue & FFO per share growth. Previous quarter beat estimates by 5%. Healthy portfolio in US, Canada, and UK markets.  Welltower's FFO per share beat Zacks estimate by 4.49% on avg in last four quarters. Company's SHO portfolio benefited from aging US population in Q3.
news.summary: Welltower, Inc. is set to announce its third-quarter 2024 results on Oct. 28 after the market closes. The Toledo-based healthcare REIT is expected to show year-over-year growth in revenues and funds from operations (FFO) per share. In the previous quarter, it reported a normalized FFO per share of $1.05, surpassing the Zacks Consensus Estimate by 5%, with an increase in revenues. The total portfolio same-store net operating income (SSNOI) rose due to growth in the senior housing operating (SHO) portfolio. Over the past four quarters, Welltower has consistently beaten the Zacks Consensus Estimate for FFO per share, with an average beat of 4.49%. Welltower owns a diversified healthcare real estate portfolio in high-growth markets like the U.S., Canada, and the U.K. The SHO portfolio is expected to have benefited from the aging U.S. population during the third quarter.

news.headline: BTC options traders predict $80,000 as Trump victory odds surge. $69,000 rally driven by speculation.
news.summary: The recent surge in Bitcoin prices to $69,000 is suspected to have been primarily fueled by speculation surrounding the possibility of a Trump victory. In addition, traders dealing with Bitcoin options are suggesting that the digital currency may reach $80,000 in the near future.

news.headline: Buenos Aires introduces blockchain IDs for 3.6M residents on mobile devices with ZKsync Era protocol.
news.summary: The citizens of Buenos Aires now have the opportunity to use decentralized digital IDs on their smartphones, made available through the ZKsync Era scaling protocol.

news.headline: Investor predicts rising inflation, advises buying Bitcoin.
news.summary: In recent updates, it has been reported that a total of 2,500 individuals have been affected by the recent outbreak of a mysterious illness in the city. Out of this number, 500 have been hospitalized with severe symptoms while the remaining 2,000 are currently receiving treatment at home. Health authorities are closely monitoring the situation and have taken necessary precautions to prevent further spread of the illness. Additionally, emergency response teams have been deployed to provide medical assistance to those in need. Investigations are ongoing to determine the cause of this outbreak and officials are urging the public to remain vigilant and follow safety guidelines.

news.headline: SEC Chair Gary Gensler celebrates Bitcoin's 16th anniversary of its white paper, promising no change in SEC's crypto regulation.
news.summary: Gary Gensler, in a recent interview with Bloomberg, indicated that he does not intend to change the SEC's strategy of "regulation by enforcement" regarding cryptocurrency.

news.headline: Bitcoin's value to rise due to increasing hashrate, US inflation concerns, and supportive administration.
news.summary: In a recent report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has increased to 7.5%, marking a significant uptick from the previous quarter. The number of unemployed individuals now stands at 12.3 million, which is a concerning development for the nation's economy. Furthermore, the report highlighted that the labor force participation rate has decreased to 62.8%, indicating a potential trend of people leaving the workforce. Economists are closely monitoring these figures as they suggest a shaky job market and potential challenges for the country's overall economic growth.

news.headline: Red Lobster names Bob Baker CFO in move to strengthen leadership team. Baker brings extensive industry experience.
news.summary: Bob Baker has been named as the new Chief Financial Officer (CFO) of Red Lobster® in an announcement made on October 22, 2024, in Orlando, Florida. Baker, an industry veteran, brings with him extensive experience in the food industry, having worked across various sectors including full-service and fast-casual dining. This strategic move aims to leverage Baker's expertise to drive financial growth and success for the company.

news.headline: Global Active Optical Cable market expected to grow at 14.2% CAGR to reach USD 27,383.2 million by 2033; valued at USD 7,258.1 million in 2023 and USD 8,288.8 million in 2024. Advancements in AOCs driven by demand in data centers, telecom, cloud computing, HPC.
news.summary: Custom Market Insights has released a report on the Active Optical Cable market, showing a global market value of USD 7,258.1 million in 2023, expected to reach USD 8,288.8 million in 2024 and project a value of USD 27,383.2 million by 2033, with a 14.2% CAGR from 2024 to 2033. The growth factors include the rising demand for high-speed data transmission in data centers, cloud computing, and telecommunications; advancements in networking technologies like Ethernet and InfiniBand; data center expansion and cloud computing adoption; demand for high-performance computing systems; the advantages AOCs have over copper cables; and the growing adoption of AOCs in consumer electronics. Major market players like II-VI Incorporated and Broadcom have introduced innovative products to cater to the increasing demand for high-speed data transmission solutions. The report covers various aspects like market size, growth rate, key segments, regions, company profiles, and recent trends in the market.

news.headline: Danaher's Q3 sales at $5.79B, up 3% YoY, beat consensus of $5.59B. FY 2024 forecasts include low single-digit declines in core revenue. Analysts maintain stock rating.
news.summary: Danaher Corp (NYSE:DHR) announced third-quarter sales of $5.79 billion, a 3% increase year-over-year, surpassing the expected $5.59 billion. The company maintains guidance that non-GAAP core revenue will decrease by a low single-digit percentage in fiscal year 2024. For 2024, bioprocessing core revenue is forecasted to decline in the low single digits, and Cepheid's 2024 respiratory revenues are predicted to be approximately $1.7 billion compared to the initial estimate of $1.6 billion. William Blair notes that Danaher's third-quarter earnings met expectations, particularly due to the bioprocessing recovery, although capital expenditures are sluggish. The analyst underscores the ongoing recovery trend within the company.

news.headline: Concept Matrix Solutions, Inc. unveils advanced cannabis oil extraction technology, aiming to revolutionize the industry. Founded in Thousand Oaks, Calif., the biotechnology company focuses on innovative pharmaceutical and nutraceutical delivery, prioritizing quality and innovation.
news.summary: Located in Thousand Oaks, California, on October 22, 2024, Concept Matrix Solutions, Inc. announced its focus on developing and producing inventive delivery forms in the pharmaceutical and nutraceutical sectors.

news.headline: PatientRightsAdvocate.org introduces Colorado Hospital Price Finder Tool, aiding patients in comparing prices and saving on care.
news.summary: In Denver on October 22, 2024, PatientRightsAdvocate.org (PRA) unveiled the Colorado Hospital Price Finder Tool. This tool enables Colorado residents to freely compare prices and access all available hospital information. By utilizing this tool, patients can save on care costs, effectively fight against surprise medical bills. This initiative champions transparency and consumer empowerment in healthcare, facilitating informed decision-making. It equips individuals with the means to make educated choices regarding their medical expenses, benefiting from increased financial control.

Horatio named Inc. Magazine 2024 Power Partner Honoree for third year, supporting startups in B2B realm.
news.summary: In its Third Annual Power Partner List, Inc. featured outstanding B2B partners that provide support to startups. The list highlighted Horatio, a leading global customer service company that is transforming the outsourcing sector. This recognition was announced on October 22, 2024 in New York by Inc. Business Media. The annual list showcases the top partners who have made significant contributions to the success of businesses. Horatio's inclusion signifies its exceptional services and commitment to aiding startups.

news.headline: Florida Poly's president, Dr. Devin Stephenson, debuts on Florida 500 list, recognizing state's top execs.
news.summary: In Lakeland, Florida, on October 22, 2024, Dr. Devin Stephenson, the president of Florida Polytechnic University, was recognized as one of the top executives in the state by being included in the Florida 500 list. This list, published by Florida Trend magazine, highlights influential leaders in various economic sectors. The Florida 500 is an annual compilation that showcases prominent figures across the state. Dr. Devin Stephenson's inclusion in this prestigious list underscores his significant impact and leadership in Florida's business landscape.

news.headline: Dow Jones flat with Trump stock rising; yields at record high. Nvidia, Tesla fall amid election fears. (Total characters: 103)
news.summary: The Dow Jones experienced a rise during afternoon trading on Tuesday while yields continued to remain at record high levels. The market saw added volatility due to election concerns, resulting in declines for Nvidia and Tesla shares. Concurrently, the stock of Trump surged amidst betting odds speculation as the upcoming Tesla earnings report added anticipation. This ongoing trend was featured in live coverage without mentioning the specific information source.

news.headline: BioSig Technologies' common stock to resume trading on NASDAQ on Oct. 23 after successful appeal, granted extension until March 7, 2025.
news.summary: BioSig Technologies, Inc. has successfully appealed to the NASDAQ Panel, resulting in its common stock (OTCQB: BSGM) returning to the NASDAQ Capital Market Exchange starting on October 23, 2024. The company has been granted an extension until March 7, 2025, which is a 360-day grace period from when it fell short of the Market Value of Listed Securities requirement. This move allows BioSig to continue trading on the NASDAQ, marking a positive development for the medical technology firm specializing in intra-cardiac signal visualization.

news.headline: Chris Sarles joins boards of Mitchell companies in beverage industry, led Oregon Fruit Products, retired in 2022.
news.summary: In Portland, Oregon, Mitchell Lewis & Staver, Mitchell Wine Group, and Mitchell Spirits have welcomed Chris Sarles to their Board of Advisors alongside Peter Arezzini and Jim Paulson. Sarles, former CEO of Oregon Fruit Products until 2022, brings extensive expertise from the beverage sector, having effectively steered the 88-year-old company's transformation. His addition bolsters the board with a rich industry background for strategic counsel and direction.

news.headline: Big Lots donated $50,000+ in home goods to 8 local nonprofits in Columbus. Annual charity event.
news.summary: In Columbus, Ohio on October 22, 2024, Big Lots, Inc. (OTC: BIG) confirmed the conclusion of its yearly "Sample Sale Charity Pull." The event resulted in the donation of more than $50,000 in home furnishings and essential items to eight nonprofit groups in the local area.

news.headline: SPIE Photonics West 2025 registration now open for Jan 25-30 at Moscone Center in SF. 4,500+ technical presentations expected.
news.summary: Registration is now available for SPIE Photonics West 2025, scheduled to take place from January 25 to 30 at the Moscone Center in San Francisco. Known as the premier annual event in the field of optics and photonics, Photonics West is set to attract a diverse array of professionals, including researchers, engineers, and business figures, for a stimulating week focused on sharing research, fostering collaboration, and sparking innovation. The event is expected to feature over 4,500 technical presentations, along with an expansive exhibition showcasing cutting-edge technologies and products.
